scenes.title:
Forget armies.
Power today looks like this.
scenes.spokenText: Forget armies. Power today looks like this.

scenes.title: Data Centers
scenes.spokenText: Rows of servers. Hidden inside windowless buildings. These are data centers. And they’re becoming the most important assets in the world.

scenes.title: The Global Backbone
scenes.spokenText: Because everything runs on them: AI. Finance. Cloud. Even national security.

scenes.title:
If these buildings stop...
Systems pause.
scenes.spokenText: If these buildings stop… it’s not just websites going down. Entire systems pause.

scenes.title: Strategic Selection
scenes.spokenText: That’s why countries are racing to build them. Near power grids. Near water. Near government control.

scenes.title: Geopolitics of Compute
scenes.spokenText: This isn’t just tech anymore. It’s geopolitics. Compute is the new oil.

scenes.subtitle:
The countries that control compute...
Shape the future.
scenes.spokenText: And the countries that control it… don’t just run data. They shape the future.
